Both `src/query/index.rs` and `src/query/duckdb_backend.rs` only have `parse_file` in comments — no call sites. Now let me verify `src/parser/treesitter.rs` has a call (not just definition):

The grep already showed `src/parser/treesitter.rs:271` has `match parse_file(...)` — that's a call site (recursive call). And line 13 is the definition `pub fn parse_file(`. So treesitter.rs contains a call.

Now let me collect the final list of files with actual call sites (excluding definition-only and comment-only occurrences):

- `src/index.rs` ✅ (call at line 34)

- `src/query/index.rs` ❌ (comment only)
